name: Consumer Credit Counseling Service of the Mid-Ohio Valley
description_short: Local nonprofit offering free-to-low-cost debt counseling, bankruptcy guidance, and financial coaching in the Mid-Ohio Valley region.
description_long:
Consumer Credit Counseling Service of the Mid-Ohio Valley (CCCS MOV) is a local nonprofit organization dedicated to helping individuals and families achieve financial wellness through education and proven counseling programs. The organization operates from the Greater Mid-Ohio Valley region and serves thousands of clients annually with affordable financial services.

CCCS MOV offers comprehensive debt management counseling, bankruptcy pre-filing counseling, financial coaching, budgeting assistance, HUD housing counseling, and home buyer education. They provide services through multiple delivery methods including in-person training, online workshops, and individualized counseling sessions. Their team holds several certifications and uses goal-setting and personalized financial planning to address client-specific needs.

The organization distinguishes itself through income-based sliding scale fees that make services affordable regardless of income or family size. They emphasize proactive financial planning alongside crisis support, and their counselors are described as interactive listeners who follow up when answers aren't immediately available. Client testimonials highlight success with debt payoff programs (one client paid off debt in three years) and business financial literacy.

A significant limitation is the lack of published pricing, service area clarity, or detailed program descriptions beyond general categories. The website provides no information about wait times, average counseling costs, certifications held, or geographic coverage boundaries. Potential clients must contact the organization directly for specifics, and there's no indication whether services are available remotely or only in-person.
pros: Income-based sliding scale fees make services accessible regardless of financial situation
Team holds multiple certifications and reports working with thousands of clients successfully
Offers both crisis debt management and proactive long-term financial planning programs
Multiple service delivery formats including in-person, online workshops, and individual counseling
HUD housing counseling and home buyer education available, not just debt-focused services
Local nonprofit with stated commitment to understanding client circumstances and serving community
Documented client success including three-year debt payoff program results
cons: Website lacks specific pricing information or published fee schedules despite income-based claims
No geographic service area clearly defined; unclear if serving entire Mid-Ohio Valley or limited locations
Minimal detail about counselor certifications or qualifications beyond general reference to certifications
No information about average timeline for appointments or wait periods
Website provides no details on remote versus in-person service availability or accessibility
best_for: Individuals and families seeking debt management counseling in the Mid-Ohio Valley region
People considering bankruptcy who need pre-filing counseling and guidance on options
First-time homebuyers needing HUD-approved housing education and financial preparation
Low-to-moderate income households needing affordable financial coaching and budgeting help
diagnosis: CCCS MOV is best for Mid-Ohio Valley residents with debt management or bankruptcy concerns who qualify based on income and can access their services locally. The primary caveat is lack of transparency about pricing, service area boundaries, and specific counselor qualifications—making it essential to contact them directly before assuming eligibility or availability.
services: Debt management counseling and payment plan development
Bankruptcy pre-filing counseling and decision guidance
Individual financial coaching for money goal achievement
HUD housing counseling and home buyer education
Financial literacy and financial wellness workshops
Email newsletter with financial advice and event updates
